Leonard, DMD) vs. current holder of phone (312) 942-0200: 'Leonard Dental Group' at 325 S Paulina St, Suite 150, Chicago, IL 60612 (per patientconnect365.com booking listing), whose site (leonarddentalgroup.com) names Daniel C. notes: The vendor-hint URL (leonard-dental-group.business.site) is dead (404). Direct-searching the record's exact phone in quotes, "(312) 942-0200", per the successor-detection protocol, shows it is now tied to a DIFFERENT named/branded entity, 'Leonard Dental Group' at 325 S Paulina St #150 (not 326 S Marshfield Ave, the record address) -- a patientconnect365.com booking page explicitly lists that exact phone with that address under 'Leonard Dental Group'. Third-party listings separately tie 'Ashland Dental' (the record's named entity) at 326 S Marshfield Ave to the same phone number and to Dr. John P. Leonard, DMD -- same family surname as the Leonard Dental Group doctors, suggesting a rebrand/relocation rather than coincidence. leonarddentalgroup.com itself returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch (likely bot-blocking) so its content could not be directly loaded to confirm address/roster; this is inferred from search-engine indexing and the booking-platform listing. Recommend the student call ahead and confirm whether Ashland Dental still exists at 326 S Marshfield or has become Leonard Dental Group at 325 S Paulina before treating this as a live independent lead.

Corroborated exactly: allstardentalclinic.com's United Center location page lists street address '2316 W Madison St' and phone (312) 491-0601, matching the record exactly. A demandforce URL slug ('ashdentalpcdbaallstardentalclinicsite2') independently confirms the legal entity 'ASH DENTAL PC' does business as 'All Star Dental Clinic', tying the record's legal name to this brand. Careers page (https://allstardentalclinic.com/careers/) has a fully detailed 'Dental Assistant' opening at this exact Madison St location; its application form also indicates the org is hiring more broadly for Dental Receptionist, Associate Dentist, Pediatric Dentist, and Orthodontist roles, but without location-specific detailed listings for those, so only Dental Assistant is included as a confirmed opening. Patient testimonials mention 'Dr. Lang' and 'Dr. Yousef' but no formal named roster/bio page was found, so no doctors are listed. MULTI-LOCATION GROUP: All Star Dental operates at least 5 offices (Aurora, Chicago-Austin, Chicago-United Center, Blue Island, Joliet, IL) -- this is a small dental chain, not a single independent office.

leedentalclinic.com is a JavaScript-rendered site: WebFetch loaded it 3 times (homepage, /contact, /meet-the-dentists) but only page titles returned, no body text extractable by the fetch tool. Corroboration instead relies on: (1) it is the exact-name-matching top organic search hit for the record's precise address query; (2) Yelp (144 reviews) confirms the same address (3811 N Broadway St) and phone (773-281-7351) exactly; (3) ADA's official Find-a-Dentist directory lists two dentists surnamed Lee -- Dr. Andrew C. Lee (DDS, UIC) and Dr. Anthony C. Lee (DMD, Tufts) -- both tagged '60613', matching the record's provider_count of 2 exactly. No hiring/careers content was found. Recommend calling to confirm current roster/openings given the site could not be directly rendered.
